bird.name: Sulphur-billed nuthatch
bird.summary: The sulphur-billed nuthatch (Sitta oenochlamys) is a species of bird in the family Sittidae. It is endemic to the Philippines.

locations.id: loc-熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林-90e2a768
locations.name: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林

relations.subject: Sulphur-billed nuthatch
relations.object_id: loc-熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林-90e2a768
relations.object: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林
relations.evidence: Its natural habitats are tropical moist lowland forest and tropical moist montane forest. It is commonly found in mixed flocks along with Blue-headed fantails, sunbirds, flowerpeckers and other small forest birds

relations.subject: Sulphur-billed nuthatch
relations.evidence: Its natural habitats are tropical moist lowland forest and tropical moist montane forest. It is commonly found in mixed flocks along with Blue-headed fantails, sunbirds, flowerpeckers and other small forest birds
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Sulphur-billed nuthatch
relations.evidence: The population is decreasing due to the habitat loss and deforestation in the Philippines
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Sulphur-billed nuthatch
relations.evidence: The population is decreasing due to the habitat loss and deforestation in the Philippines
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
